name: Jalan Merdeka
description: In front of ST. Angela school, across from Bandung City Hall. Existing shelters are in good condition.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for big shelter.

name: Stasiun Timur
description: On the left side of PD Warna Agung Store. Sidewalks in good condition.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Stasiun Bandung
description: In front of Coffee Shop. Sidewalk has a split level (step) at the back.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for big shelter.

name: SMAN 6 Bandung
description: In front of SMAN 6 Bandung City. Sidewalk contains planting pots.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: SDN 013 Pasirkaliki
description: Across from SDN 013 Pasirkaliki. Impacted by pedestrian bridge structure.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: SMKN 12 Bandung
description: In front of SMKN 12 Bandung City. Existing bus stop in good condition.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for medium shelter.

name: SMA Alfa Centauri
description: Left side of Alfa Centauri High School Gate. Impacts boundary garden.
recommendation: Suitable for medium shelter (requires removal of park).

name: Seberang Stasiun Kiaracondong
description: Across from Kiaracondong Station. Sidewalk is partially dirt.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for medium shelter.

name: Stasiun Kiaracondong
description: In front of Kiaracondong Station. Width is less than 2 meters.
recommendation: Land insufficient width; only suitable for bus poles.

name: SMKN 7 Bandung
description: In front of SMKN 7 Bandung. Affects Indosat manhole and one 40cm tree.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for medium shelter.

name: B Expo (Tenth Avenue)
description: In front of Tenth Avenue. Drainage behind the sidewalk can be utilized.
recommendation: Can be extended by widening above drainage (within ROW).

name: Alun-Alun Cicendo
description: In front of Alun-Alun Cicendo. Affects park bench set.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for medium shelter.

name: Jalan A. H. Nasution 1
description: In front of Kannasya café. Requires demolishing potted plants.
recommendation: Suitable for shelter by demolishing potted plant (within ROW).

name: SDN Andir Kidul
description: In front of SDN 172 Andir Kidul. No existing sidewalk, currently a park.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Borma Cipadung
description: In front of Borma Cipadung. Existing bus stop was recently renovated (Feb 2025).
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: BIMC Bandung
description: In front of Bidakara Medical Center and Tomoro Coffee.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: Piset Square
description: In front of PISET Square. Existing sidewalk is in poor condition.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Superindo Moch Ramdan
description: Near Super Indo Moch. Ramdan. Roadside workshops in the vicinity.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Al-Irsyad Satya Islamic School
description: In front of Al-Irsyad School. Existing stop is on school land.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: Seberang Al-Irsyad Satya
description: Across from Al-Irsyad School. Sidewalk is in good condition.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Transmart Cimahi
description: In front of Transmart Cimahi. Width is only 1.35 meters.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: Pasar Antri Baru
description: In front of Pasar Antri Baru and on the banks of Cimahi River.
recommendation: Shelter not possible due to river edge; adjust size or use Totem.

name: Samsat Cimahi
description: In front of SAMSAT Cimahi office. Existing bus stop is damaged.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: POLSEK Sukajadi
description: In front of Polsek Sukajadi. Existing bus stop size is 2x6.5m.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia
description: Near UPI gate. Median option affects Welcome Signage.
recommendation: Median option suitable; sidewalk option is too narrow.

name: RS. Borromeus
description: In front of Borromeus Hospital. Park area within ROW must be used.
recommendation: Park must be demolished (within ROW) for edge design.

name: Mengger Girang
description: On road median. Drainage exists under the sidewalk.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: Buah Batu Square
description: In front of Buah Batu Square. Width is only 0.98 meters.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: SDN Cipagalo 03
description: In front of SDN Cipagalo 03. Drainage exists under the sidewalk.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: PGRI Kabupaten Bandung
description: In front of PGRI office. No sidewalks; current dirt road shoulders.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: SMPN 1 Katapang
description: In front of SMPN 1 Katapang. Dirt shoulder; affects 1 tree.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for bus poles.

name: Borma Sayati
description: In front of Borma Sayati and Mie Gacoan. Width is only 0.75m.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: Pasar Caringin
description: In front of Caringin wholesale market. Site of a former bus stop.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Pasar Leuwipanjang
description: In front of Pasar Leuwipanjang. Width is only 1.3 meters.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: Pasar Cileunyi
description: In front of Pasar Cileunyi. Dirt road shoulders with Angkot stop area.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Unpad Jatinangor Gate D
description: In front of Unpad Jatinangor. Sidewalk is in good condition.
recommendation: Suitable for partial Medium Shelter (shelter + totem).

name: Jatinangor Town Square
description: In front of Jatinangor Town Square. Currently dirt road shoulders.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.

name: Masjid Al-Jabbar 2
description: Across from Masjid Al-Jabbar. Width is only 1.8 meters.
recommendation: Land insufficient; only suitable for bus poles.

name: Masjid Al-Jabbar 1
description: In front of Masjid Al-Jabbar. Affected by occasional illegal parking.
recommendation: Land area available is suitable for Medium shelter.
